models.description: RIFE v4.7 — Faster Frame Interpolation (2x FPS). Ensemble enabled, scale=1. Lighter model for real-time use. 21MB.

models.name: RIFE v4.8 (Balanced Frame Interpolation)
models.description: RIFE v4.8 — Balanced Frame Interpolation (2x FPS). Middle ground between v4.7 (fast) and v4.9 (quality). 21MB.

models.name: RIFE v4.9 (Quality Frame Interpolation)
models.description: RIFE v4.9 — Best-quality Real-Time Frame Interpolation (2x FPS). Ensemble enabled, scale=1. Recommended for film/anime. 21MB.

models.name: GFPGAN v1.4 (Face Restore)
models.description: GFPGAN v1.4 — Tencent ARC's face restoration GAN. Restores heavily degraded faces. 512x512 crops. Apache 2.0. Mirrored via facefusion/models-3.0.0. ~340MB.

models.name: CodeFormer (Face Restore)
models.description: CodeFormer - Robust face restoration with transformer codebook. Good for severely degraded faces. 512x512. S-Lab License. Mirrored via facefusion/models-3.0.0. ~377MB.

models.name: Real-CUGAN x2 (Anime Quality)
models.description: Real-CUGAN x2 - Bilibili AI Lab. Cascaded U-Net, conservative variant preserves linework. Best general-purpose anime 2x. ~12MB.

models.name: Real-CUGAN x4 (Anime Quality)
models.description: Real-CUGAN x4 - Bilibili AI Lab. Cleaner than realesrgan-animevideo-x4 on linework, slower than anime-compact-x4 but higher quality. ~12MB.

models.name: DRCT-L x4 (SOTA Photo)
models.description: DRCT-L x4 - Dense-Residual Connected Transformer. Sharper than DAT2 on photo content, ~3GB VRAM for 1080p input. Recommended for poster/backdrop refresh. ~80MB.

models.name: BHI-RealPLKSR x4 (Speed Champion)
models.description: BHI-RealPLKSR x4 - 2x faster than DAT2 at comparable quality. ~5fps@256 on RTX 3060. New default for mid-tier batch. ~30MB.

models.name: RIFE v4.25 (Frame Interpolation - Latest)
models.description: RIFE v4.25 - current SOTA frame interpolation, better scene-bleeding handling than v4.7-4.9. Recommended new default for 24-60fps. ~22MB.
